title: Mapping the global landscape of research on immune checkpoint inhibitor-associated cardiotoxicity: A quantitative and visualized bibliometric study (2016-2025).
snippet: Immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs) have transformed oncologic practice, but their expanding use has heightened concern about potentially fatal cardiovascular toxicity. This bibliometric study mapped the global research landscape and temporal evolution of ICI-associated cardiotoxicity from 2016 to 2025. Records were retrieved from the Web of Science Core Co...
